response.justification: Solid generalist engineer with 17+ years of experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure, plus genuine entrepreneurial credentials via GISCollective and CMSushi. However, the role requires a Director-level AI strategy expert with deep, demonstrated AI/ML product ownership and a track record of advising enterprise customers — none of which is evidenced here. AI involvement is limited to roughly one year of MCP tooling and agentic workflow support at re:cinq (April 2025–present), with no prior ML product delivery, no publications, and no recognized thought leadership in AI or cloud platform strategy. Cloud exposure is minimal (AWS CDK at Optilyz) and the entire career trajectory peaks at Staff/Senior IC scope, well below the cross-organizational executive influence this position demands.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks (web, embedded, mobile, infrastructure, low-latency systems) fully satisfies the years-of-experience minimum

Genuine founder-mode mindset demonstrated through GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform, NGO/conservation adoption) and self-built CMSushi CMS, aligning with the entrepreneurial-within-org preference
High-scale systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s, low-latency DLang services with async I/O and real-time metadata) shows infrastructure-depth credibility
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and shallow — MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq begin only in April 2025; no prior AI/ML product ownership, no model development, and no recognized artifacts (papers, platforms, keynotes) in the field

Cloud depth is minimal — AWS CDK used at Optilyz for a pricing service, but no cloud architecture, platform design, or infrastructure strategy experience at the scale needed to advise strategic enterprise customers

Seniority gap is significant — career arc peaks at Staff/Senior individual contributor; no evidence of Director-level scope, executive stakeholder influence, cross-org strategy ownership, or external advisory engagements
